headline: KNOW WHAT PUTS YOU ON THE RADAR
subheading: The risk signals, recalls and data flags that bring an MHRA inspector to your gate.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition rendered in deep navy with luminous teal and cyan, lit by a single subtle fresh-green accent glow. Conceptual metaphor for regulatory scrutiny driven by a site's own data: a glowing abstract radar sweep over a deep navy field, its concentric rings catching scattered points of light where risk signals surface, with faint rising trend lines and gentle warning pulses converging toward the centre like a site coming into focus. Around it, abstract glass-walled cleanroom corridors and softly blurred rows of clear and amber vials recede into shallow depth of field, intersected by translucent flowing data ribbons and delicate node networks suggesting deviations, recalls and audit trails feeding a quiet risk picture. Immaculate reflective surfaces, cinematic premium atmosphere, sterile yet warm, soft volumetric light, refined and authoritative mood. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
